_comment: Edit this file to control which competitions Diski Logue tracks. 'league_id' fields marked null need a one-time lookup — run: python -m diski_logue.cli find-league --search "<name>" --country "<country>" — then fill in the ID. Competitions with a null league_id/id are skipped automatically.

competitions.name: Botswana Premier League
competitions._note: No confirmed API coverage for Botswana leagues — maintain results yourself in these CSVs. See diski_logue/data_sources/csv_import.py for the format.
